title: jasione montana subsp. penicillata
intro: Jasione montana subsp. penicillata, also known as Penicillate Cat's Ear or Mountain Bluebells, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the bellflower family, characterized by its blue-purple flowers and grass-like foliage. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Jasione montana subsp. penicillata include its antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve coughs and congestion, as well as its ability to calm digestive issues and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of Jasione montana subsp. penicillata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
